arts.ttl: 'Now it's time' - Carlo Ancelotti admission as Real Madrid name squad for Arsenal showdown - football.london
arts.sum: "[Mikel] Arteta is working with them for a very long time, so they have a really clear idea on how to play, both defensively and offensively. Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has made five changes from the squad that travelled to the Emirates Stadium for their 3-0 defeat at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid sources believe player will join Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly not actively working on a deal to sign Martin Zubimendi, and seem to believe he’ll end up at Arsenal. The Real Sociedad midfielder has shone in La Liga and will surely be snapped up by a bigger club before too long. Arsenal have long been linked strongly with Zubimendi, though there […] The post Real Madrid sources believe player will join Arsenal appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid send eight-word warning to Arsenal after special request approved by UEFA
arts.sum: Arsenal travel to Real Madrid's Estadio Santiago Bernabeu hoping to complete the job they started with a 3-0 win in London and progress to the Champions League semi-finals

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues pre-match message to Arsenal stars ahead of huge Champions League second leg against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has revealed what kind of mentality Arsenal will be carrying into the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final second leg against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick edging towards dropping star for Copa del Rey against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona squeezed through against Borussia Dortmund in their Champions League quarter-final on Tuesday night, but it was a game that brought a hangover with it. Despite returning to the final four for the first time in six years in Europe, there were more questions than answers for Hansi Flick. arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal Betting Preview: Get 50/1 on a goal to be scored with Paddy Power
arts.sum: Arsenal head to the Santiago Bernabeu tonight defending a 3-0 lead in the Champions League quarter-final. The Gunners ripped apart Real Madrid, the defending European champions, in a dazzling second ...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fire ominous Arsenal warning as official club account sends message
arts.sum: The reigning Champions League holders are looking to complete another famous evening at the Bernabeu and deny Arsenal a place in the final four. Real Madrid have posted an ominous warning as they look to overcome their three-goal deficit against Arsenal in the Champions League on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Ollie Watkins transfer green light after failed January bid
arts.sum: In their search for a striker during the January transfer window, the Gunners saw a £40 million bid rejected by Aston Villa . Arsenal may have been handed a potential transfer green light to make another move for Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: 11 players to miss Real Madrid vs Arsenal as Mikel Arteta confirms double injury boost
arts.sum: Arsenal visit Real Madrid for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final on Wednesday and both Mikel Arteta and Carlo Ancelotti have depleted squads
